nodes.premise: Meal: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Twist - name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Twist | short_description: Mediterranean-inspired grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil, featuring a garlic-ginger flavor twist. | meal_suggestion: Mix cooked quinoa with chickpeas, cucumber, and tomato. Top with feta and drizzle with olive oil. Optional: finish with a garlic-ginger twist dressing or a squeeze of lemon and fresh herbs. | nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich base from quinoa and chickpeas, plus veggies for hydration. Healthy fats come from feta and olive oil; flavor inspired by a garlic-ginger twist.

nodes.premise: Meal: Chickpea Salad Pita — Citrus Fresh Plate - name: Chickpea Salad Pita — Citrus Fresh Plate | short_description: Chickpea salad with cucumber and tomato tucked into a whole-wheat pita, brightened by lemon. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side of fruit or a light yogurt.
